title: webtrigger onBlur
text: webtrigger onBlur This web trigger is used to program behavior when the DSP widget loses focus. Declaration: Explain this code webtriggeronBlur Optional scope block Optional variables block javascript Javascript to implement the client-side trigger endjavascript end Copy Parameters: None Applies to: This trigger is applicable only on HTML-based DSP widgets that can get and lose focus. htmlinput htmlselect htmlradiogroup htmltextarea genericHTML Activation: Activated when the DSP widget loses focus. Default behavior: None Behavior upon completion: None Description If defined, the onBlur trigger is fired when the user tabs or clicks away from a field in a DSP. It can be used to reverse the effects applied by the onFocus trigger. Example: Using OnBlur In the following example, the trigger prevents the user from moving to another field if the entered data in the field incorrectly. ; On ID field webtrigger OnBlur scope output endscope javascript // if (this.getError() !== null) { this.focus(); } endjavascript end Copy Related Links webtrigger onFocus This web trigger is used to program behavior when the DSP widget gets focus as a result of user interaction.
